label: content

ocr_findings.json_says: Callout header not present as standalone entity in output (correctly handled)
ocr_findings.note: Known OCR misread of '試験にはコレが出る！'. The callout bullet content (魔の川, 死の谷, ダーウィンの海, キャズム, イノベーター理論) IS correctly captured as structured term definitions — Stage 4 correctly used the callout bullets as source material for term entities without leaking the garbled header.

ocr_findings.ocr_says: Complex multi-row 5G roadmap table with ~10 rows and 7 columns, spanning years ~2018-2023
ocr_findings.json_says: Captured as figure entity with caption '技術ロードマップの例（5G関連技術のロードマップ）' and image_ref 'img-0.jpeg'
ocr_findings.note: The complex roadmap table was represented as a figure rather than a structured table. Given its complexity (merged cells, nested text, diagram-like layout), this is an appropriate fallback. LOW severity, not a fidelity defect.

narrative: Page 141 has a section entity, 6 term entities (魔の川/死の谷/ダーウィンの海/キャズム/イノベーター理論/ロードマップ), and 1 figure entity. All JP term definitions exactly match the OCR callout bullets and prose. The garbled callout header is suppressed. The complex 5G roadmap table is appropriately represented as a figure. PASS.
